Interview Hub

Company Interview Practice

Prepare for specific company interviews with curated question sets, process insights, and insider tips.

🛒

Amazon

241 questions · 5 rounds

Focus on Leadership Principles, system design, and scalability. Amazon favors practical problem-solving with clear communication.

Difficulty

35E45M20H

Top Topics

ArrayDynamic ProgrammingTreeGraphSystem Design

💡 Leadership Principles

Know all 16 Amazon Leadership Principles. Every behavioral question maps to one.

🔍

Google

287 questions · 5 rounds

Google interviews emphasize algorithmic thinking, data structures, and code quality. Expect open-ended problems requiring elegant solutions.

Difficulty

20E50M30H

Top Topics

GraphDynamic ProgrammingStringMathSystem Design

💡 Clean Code

Googlers value clean, readable code. Talk through your thought process at every step.

💻

Microsoft

198 questions · 4 rounds

Microsoft focuses on problem-solving ability and culture fit. Interviews are collaborative with emphasis on system design for senior roles.

Difficulty

40E45M15H

Top Topics

ArrayStringTreeDynamic ProgrammingOOP Design

💡 Collaboration

Microsoft values collaboration. Show how you work with others and handle feedback gracefully.

📘

Meta

175 questions · 4 rounds

Meta (formerly Facebook) interviews focus on product sense, coding speed, and system design. They value people who move fast.

Difficulty

25E50M25H

Top Topics

Dynamic ProgrammingGraphArraySystem DesignProduct Design

💡 Speed Matters

Meta values coding speed. Practice writing bug-free code quickly under time pressure.
